name: activity-feed
title: Activity Feed
description: Timeline of events and user activities with filtering, pagination, and multiple display modes for SaaS dashboards and app interfaces

props.name: activities
props.description: Array of activity items to display

props.name: showFilters
props.description: Show filter chips above the activity list

props.name: filters
props.description: Array of filter options for the activity feed

props.name: onFilterChange
props.description: Callback fired when a filter is selected

props.name: compact
props.description: Use compact layout with reduced spacing

props.name: hasMore
props.description: Show 'Load more' button when there are more items to load

props.name: onLoadMore
props.description: Callback fired when 'Load more' button is clicked

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading spinner and disable interactions

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message to display when there are no activities
